message:
fix: use appendChild instead of term.open() for terminal re-mounting (#68)

xterm.js term.open() can only be called once per Terminal instance.
Subsequent calls silently fail, leaving containers empty.

When moving terminals between single view and tile mode, use
container.appendChild(inst.term.element) to relocate the existing
terminal DOM element instead of calling term.open() again.

Fixes empty tiles and blank screen when toggling tile mode.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
